meta_recommendations.title: Optimize Reels format (9:16 vertical video with audio)
meta_recommendations.detail: Including a fullscreen vertical video (9:16) with audio in your Reels ads can improve performance.

meta_recommendations.title: Automatically add music to 2 eligible ads
meta_recommendations.detail: Let us automatically select and add music to your ads at no cost to you, based on their content.

meta_recommendations.title: Combine 2 similar ad sets impacted by fragmentation
meta_recommendations.detail: 2 of your ad sets have similar setups, but different audiences. As a result, they may take longer to exit the learning phase and spend more budget before performance has optimized. To avoid this, combine your 2 similar ad sets into one ad set.

meta_recommendations.title: Advantage+ creative enhancement (text improvements)
meta_recommendations.detail: We will deliver different creative variations of your ad when we predict it could help improve performance with: text improvements.
